attributes.action: I would like the government to reduce fuel duty during the conflict in Iran.
attributes.background: As I stated above I would like the government/parliament to reduce the fuel duty or the VAT on fuel while the Iran conflict continues to help UK residents afford life!!

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Suspend fuel duty and VAT on fuel until the Iran conflict ends
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/763674
